description_long: This object is a stylized doll's eye, featuring a large, rounded eyeball with a detailed iris and pupil, surrounded by a pale, flesh-toned eyelid. The eyelid is angular and geometric, with sharp, polygonal edges, and is adorned with painted black eyelashes along the lower rim. The eyeball itself is glossy and spherical, with a realistic brown iris and a dark pupil, and subtle pink shading around the sclera to suggest depth and realism. The overall form is abstract, with the eyelid appearing as a flat, irregularly shaped plate partially covering the eye. The back of the eyeball is visible and unadorned, showing the continuation of the spherical form. This object is likely part of a larger doll or toy, designed to represent a single expressive eye.
description: A stylized, polygonal doll's eye with a large, glossy brown eyeball and a pale, angular eyelid featuring painted black eyelashes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed brown iris, black eyelashes, and the angular eyelid framing the eye.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the spherical shape of the eyeball and the thin, flat eyelid extending outward.
description_view_2: Top view highlights the roundness of the eyeball and the irregular, polygonal shape of the eyelid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the curvature of the eyeball and the sharp edge of the eyelid.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; only an eyelid and eyeball are present, with no garments or fabric patterns.
attribute_pose: The object represents a single eye with an eyelid partially open, no limbs or torso are present.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression, with the eyelid slightly open and the eye looking straight ahead.
attribute_hair_style: No hair is visible on this object.
